data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: RISKY.
REASON: Insufficient data for comprehensive analysis (missing model predictions, standings, H2H, key players, O2.5/BTTS odds). Significant conflict between Home PPG (0.17) and Away PPG (1.29) versus relatively close xG values (1.42 vs 1.18).
CONCLUSION: No Bet / Skip.
